label: Full-day summary with explicit times (next-morning retrospective)
content:
时间记录：6月11日。

大概是9:15起床，洗漱、吃早饭。10:00开始写阅读作业，到10:40完成阅读作业后，开始语法作业。10:40开始上语法课，到下午12:10结束。

吃完饭以后，2:00去测视力。下午状态不好，睡了一觉，大概1小时。晚上7:00吃晚饭，20分钟左右。
notes: TARGET_DATE from header (6月11日), not from created_at (6月12日). Explicit start+end times → high confidence. '2:00去测视力' has only start → medium.

label: Perfect-aspect verbs — created_at is end_time
content: 时间记录。刚吃完午饭，外卖，在家。
notes: No date header → use created_at date. '吃完' = perfect aspect → created_at 13:25 is end_time. 外卖 default = 30 min → start = 12:55.

label: Explicit duration in memo
content: 时间记录：下午打了2小时篮球，3点开始的。回来后散步了一圈大概30分钟。
notes: Explicit duration '2小时' + explicit start '3点' → high confidence. '散步30分钟' after basketball ends → chain the times.

label: Relative date reference (昨天)
content: 昨天忘记记了。昨天下午2点半去图书馆看书，大概看了3小时。晚上吃了外卖。
notes: No date header but '昨天' → target_date = 2026-06-11 (created_at 6月12日 − 1). '下午2点半' explicit + '3小时' explicit → high. '晚上吃外卖' — no exact time → evening midpoint 19:00, confidence=low.

label: Low confidence / vague — should skip or flag
content: 时间记录。今天总体状态不好，上午做了点事情，下午也没怎么动，晚上看了会儿手机。
notes: All activities vague. '下午没怎么动' — no clear activity, should be skipped entirely. Others get low confidence with time-of-day midpoints. These may or may not make it into Calendar depending on confidence threshold.

label: Diary header line — skip the #Diary line, parse the rest
content:
#Diary Jun. 15 时间记录

9:15起床洗漱，10:00开始写作业。
notes: The '#Diary Jun. 15 时间记录' line is skipped as a header — NOT parsed as an activity. TARGET_DATE is extracted from '#Diary Jun. 15'. The rest of the memo is parsed normally.

label: 自习课 absorption — create new event, don't touch read-only calendar
content: 时间记录：10:00-11:30自习课上写了英语作文。
notes: 自习课 is on a read-only calendar. Rule: create new event on 学习-作业 with [自动合并: 自习课吸收] tag. Do NOT call update_event on the read-only calendar event. Do NOT leave a separate flomo event — only the absorbed one.

label: Default-activity principle — 坐车+听播客 → 路上（听播客）
content: 时间记录：3点坐地铁去学校，路上听了一集播客，大概40分钟。
notes: Concurrent activities: transit (default — was happening anyway) + podcast (co-activity). Output is ONE event 路上（听播客）, NOT two separate events. Calendar = 路上 (the default activity's category).

label: [自动合并] tag must be at END of description, after 置信度
content: 时间记录：下午3点坐公交去图书馆，路上刷了会手机，45分钟。

expected.description_format: [flomo:<id>] <excerpt> | 置信度: high | [自动合并: 路上→刷手机]

notes: Verify description string order: [flomo:id] first, then excerpt, then 置信度, then [自动合并] LAST. The dedup check scans for [flomo:id] prefix — placing [自动合并] before it would break dedup on subsequent polls.
